hooks.command:
bash -c '
cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command" 2>/dev/null)
if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "git (commit|push)"; then
  branch=$(git -C /home/niits/workspace/personal-finance rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null)
  if [ "$branch" = "staging" ] || [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then
    echo "{\"continue\": false, \"stopReason\": \"Direct commits/pushes to $branch are not allowed. Create a feature branch first: git checkout -b feature/<name>\"}"
    exit 1
  fi
fi
'
